title: ALLO Earnings: Latest Report, Earnings Call & Financials
text: Allogene Therapeutics maintains a platform of allogeneic CAR T cell product candidates for treatment of cancer and autoimmune diseases. Recent earnings reports show progression across clinical pipeline. Q1 2026 EPS of -$0.18 beat estimates of -$0.19. Q4 2025 EPS of -$0.17 beat estimates of -$0.23 by 26%. Company has extended cash runway into Q1 2029 following April 2026 financing. Operating expenses guidance updated to $225M GAAP and $165M cash for 2026. Analyst consensus is Strong Buy with average price target of $8.71.
